user_request: Crea un juego de acción y plataformas para Amstrad CPC 6128, inspirado en Ghosts 'n Goblins, con dificultad alta, enemigos por oleadas y control preciso
orchestrator: game_concept="Action-platformer game for Amstrad CPC 6128 inspired by Ghosts 'n Goblins, featuring high difficulty, wave-based enemy spawns, and precise controls. The player navigates through hazardous levels filled with traps and enemies, aiming to defeat bosses and progress while maintaining tight control over movement and combat." genre_hint='action_platformer_run_and_gun' reference_games=["Ghosts 'n Goblins", "Ghouls 'n Ghosts", 'Rick Dangerous'] player_fantasy='The player embodies a knight or warrior battling through treacherous levels, overcoming relentless enemy waves and deadly traps with skillful movement and precise attacks. The challenge lies in mastering controls and timing to survive the brutal difficulty.' must_have_features=['Tight, responsive controls for running, jumping, and attacking', 'Smooth sprite animation and movement (60 FPS equivalent or closest achievable)', 'Wave-based enemy spawning with increasing difficulty', 'High difficulty with punishing but fair mechanics (e.g., limited continues, no checkpoints)', 'Multiple enemy types with distinct behaviors', 'Basic projectile-based combat (e.g., throwing weapons or shooting)', 'Level design with platforming challenges and traps', 'Boss fights at the end of key levels', 'Visual feedback for player actions (e.g., invincibility frames, hit reactions)', 'Optimized performance to avoid slowdowns during intense action'] nice_to_have_features=['Power-ups or temporary upgrades (e.g., stronger weapons, shields)', 'Hidden areas or secrets to reward exploration', 'Multiple selectable characters with unique abilities', 'Dynamic camera adjustments for better visibility during platforming', 'Sound effects and music to enhance tension and feedback', 'Score system with leaderboard (if feasible)'] scope=OrchestratorScope(target='vertical_slice', complexity='small') constraints=OrchestratorConstraints(target_platform='Amstrad CPC 6128', engine='CPCtelera')
narrative: theme='dark_fantasy_horror' tone='oppressive_urgent_brutal' setting='cursed_kingdom_ruins' player_role='cursed_knight' goal_fiction='break_ancient_curse_by_defeating_undead_lords' enemy_fantasy=['zombie_peasants', 'skeletal_archers', 'ghoul_hounds', 'possessed_armor', 'necromancer_boss', 'flying_imp_scouts', 'rotten_treants'] world_keywords=['crumbling_castles', 'fog_choked_forests', 'blood_moon_sky', 'collapsing_bridges', 'cursed_altars', 'undead_infested_villages', 'trap_laden_dungeons'] hud_text_style='gothic_arcade'
design: core_loop='El jugador avanza por un nivel lineal lleno de plataformas, trampas y enemigos, corriendo, saltando y disparando para eliminar oleadas de enemigos mientras esquiva obstáculos. Debe llegar al final del nivel para enfrentar a un jefe, superando la dificultad con precisión en los controles y timing.' win_condition='Derrotar al jefe final (necromancer_boss) al final del nivel.' lose_condition='Perder todas las vidas (3 inicialmente) o agotar el tiempo límite (90 segundos).' player_actions=["{'action': 'move_left', 'input': 'joystick_left/cursor_left', 'description': 'Mover al personaje a la izquierda con aceleración/desaceleración suave.'}", "{'action': 'move_right', 'input': 'joystick_right/cursor_right', 'description': 'Mover al personaje a la derecha con aceleración/desaceleración suave.'}", "{'action': 'jump', 'input': 'joystick_up/button_1', 'description': 'Saltar con altura fija y gravedad consistente.
